title: 7 Herbal Teas For Jaw Lock
description: Thymus vulgaris teas contains thymol, carvacrol, and rosmarinic acid as its active constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help reduce swelling and ease pain in the jaw. Thymol and carvacrol, in particular, have been shown to have analgesic and antispasmodic effects, making them effective in relaxing tense muscles and relieving jaw lock.
